title: CreateHive
description: The official CreateHive server modpack for all to enjoy!
body:
Hello! 

This is the official CreateHive server modpack. In this pack you can find many mods relating around technology and many other fun and adventure type aspects of the game. I am planning on adding a few performance and QoL mods just so your frames don't die and to make it much more fun.

To join the server, go to #server-info in this discord server https://discord.gg/37d4WUn4tq
